annotation_status.annotation_note: Semua label adalah placeholder kosong (.txt empty). Anotasi manual wajib dilakukan sebelum training. Gunakan LabelImg, CVAT, atau Roboflow.

blocking_reason: Label files are empty placeholders — manual annotation required before training.
label_format: YOLO: class_id x_center y_center width height (all normalized 0-1)
next_steps: 1. Annotate images using LabelImg: pip install labelImg && labelImg
2. OR upload to Roboflow for collaborative annotation
3. OR download pre-labeled dataset from Roboflow Universe (recommended)

annotation_guide.class_list_file: Create predefined_classes.txt with: ambulance, police, fire_truck, license_plate
